textByHash.1c9c948ae86131552f2200c096b4f3c13696e307: Get away! You're a thief and a desecrator of the dead.
textByHash.97c790deadee33668da3a521c048394037a84d28: It's hot and sunny, which is good enough for me. So can I help you with anything?
textByHash.560a839affb900745ddada2e4b4a1ee2024d5ade: Well I can sell you a sheet of linen for 30 coins.
textByHash.3851f6ea8fd8233ab2dc19c42c8635acd5a72940: Of course. That will be 30 coins please and thank you.
textByHash.595965ff1457116588929d09235cdf628d0fb820: What can I do for you?
textByHash.b5d4deaf104e2329b2b668efa13685292cf8ab32: All sorts of things. Why don't you have a look?
textByHash.56c5a3a05966dbda6cd4c68040084b6e8478c704: What? You intolerable, insufferable idiot. That won't work! I would say get out of my sight but that's not far enough away!
textByHash.a6c0b66b358e9e61358fad1d09dbd3861e8240c2: Clear off before I give you something to feel sorry about!
